rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Clerk Of Court To Issue Writ Of Execution Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 699.510(A)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Clerk Of Court To Issue Writ Of Execution Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 699.510(A) is OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SIU CHAN, JUSTIN TIN DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to April 9, 2020. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than March 20, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SIU CHAN, JUSTIN TIN Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint is continued to April 9, 2020. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than March 20, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For A Protective Order Regarding Plaintiffs Notice Of Taking Of Defendants Depositions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROSPERITIES MANAGMENT COMPANY, LLC, SAMANTHA SETO, KELVIN YEE, SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC, 371 BROADWAY STREET, LLC, VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY, VALSTOCK VENTURES, LLC Motion For A Protective Order Regarding Plaintiffs Notice Of Taking Of Defendants Depositions Hearing Required to address appointment of discovery referee. The Court is inclined to appoint the Honorable James McBride. Plaintiff to check availability of the proposed referee and provide dates at the hearing. The cost of the referee shall be born 100% by defendants. The referee shall reallocate costs based on the conduct of the parties. Costs shall be recoverable by the prevailing party at the conclusion of the litigation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing Date On Plaintiff'S Accompanying Motion To Compel Regarding Defendants' Depositions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 3. Hearing Date On Plaintiff'S Accompanying Motion To Compel Regarding Defendants' Depositions Hearing Required to address appointment of discovery referee. The Court is inclined to appoint the Honorable James McBride. Plaintiff to check availability of the proposed referee and provide dates at the hearing. The cost of the referee shall be born 100% by defendants. The referee shall reallocate costs based on the conduct of the parties. Costs shall be re coverable by the prevailing party at the conclusion of the litigation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SEAN ILUMIN ET AL VS. RUSSEL G. LEACH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT MARY LEACH, RUSSEL LEACH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. CCP 1061. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SEAN ILUMIN ET AL VS. RUSSEL G. LEACH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT PATRICK SULLIVAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. CCP 1061. rulings.Case Title: NANCY MGGINNIS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of each element of each cause of action as to the moving defendant and/or allege facts to support agency liability as to each cause of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IRENE CHEUNG ET AL VS. DOUGLAS GOOD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Entry Of Judgmnt For Possession Of Premises
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 6. PLAINTIFF IRENE CHEUNG, BENNY CHEUNG Mtn For Entry Of Judgmnt For Possession Of Premises is GRANTED. Judgment against Healy and Good (default previously entered) shall be entered and writ of possession shall be issued. Writ of possession shall not be enforced until March 24, 2020. If Healy vacates on or before March 24, 2020, Healy may appear ex-parte to seek the judgment vacated as to Healy only. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: E. DAYAN SANDLER VS. MARCY GRUENHUT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 11, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT MARCY GRUENHUT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. =(501/REQ)
